[Q] 물 필요해요? (mul pi-ryo-hae-yo?) / [A] 물: [Q] 어디로 가세요? (eo-di-ro ga-se-yo?) / [A] 홍대로 가주세요 (hong-dae-ro ga-ju-se-yo)
[Q] Do you need water? / [A] Water, plea: [Q] Where are you going? / [A] Please go to Hongdae.
[Q] Are you sorry? / [A] I am sorry.
[Q] Are you thankful? / [A] Yes, thank you.
[Q] Are you eating here? / [A] To go, please.
[Q] Is it a friend? / [A] It is real.

[Q] 물 필요해요? (mul pi-ryo-hae-yo?) / [A] 물: [Q] 여기서 먹어요? (yeo-gi-seo meo-geo-yo?) / [A] 먹고 갈게요 (meok-go gal-ge-yo)
[Q] Do you need water? / [A] Water, plea: [Q] Are you eating here? / [A] I will eat here.

[Q] 물 필요해요? (mul pi-ryo-hae-yo?) / [A] 물: [Q] 먹어요? 가요? (meo-geo-yo ga-yo?) / [A] 먹고 갈게요 (meok-go gal-ge-yo)
[Q] Do you need water? / [A] Water, plea: [Q] Are you eating and going? / [A] I will eat and go.

[Q] 물 필요해요? (mul pi-ryo-hae-yo?) / [A] 물: [Q] 어디에서 만나요? (eo-di-e-seo man-na-yo?) / [A] 카페에서 만나요 (ka-pe-e-seo man-na-yo)
[Q] Do you need water? / [A] Water, plea: [Q] Where shall we meet? / [A] Let's meet at the cafe.
[Q] Do you know? / [A] I am not sure.
[Q] Is it okay? / [A] It is not okay.
[Q] Is it hard? / [A] It is not hard.
[Q] Are you thankful? / [A] Thank you formally.

[Q] 물 필요해요? (mul pi-ryo-hae-yo?) / [A] 물: [Q] 어디 가고 싶어요? (eo-di ga-go si-peo-yo?) / [A] 홍대 가고 싶어요 (hong-dae ga-go si-peo-yo)
[Q] Do you need water? / [A] Water, plea: [Q] Where do you want to go? / [A] I want to go to Hongdae.
[Q] Can you tell me? / [A] Tell me.
